description: Schema for raw GitHub metrics extracted via git clone and cloc.

columns.name: url
columns.description: Full HTTPS URL of the GitHub repository.

columns.name: primary_language
columns.description: Primary programming language (inherited from target list).

columns.name: unique_authors
columns.description: Count of unique author emails found in git log (filtered for >1 line contribution).

columns.name: raw_line_count
columns.description: Total lines of code reported by cloc.

constraints.exclude: Repos with clone failures are skipped, not included here.
constraints.validation: kloc must be calculated from raw_line_count.
